label: Alternate graphic
description: A weighted alternative graphic variant for a pawn. Selected randomly at spawn using the weight field.

weight.label: Weight
weight.description: Relative selection weight for this variant. Higher values increase the probability of this graphic being chosen.

texPath.label: Texture path
texPath.description: Primary texture path for this graphic variant.

color.label: Color
color.description: Primary color tint for this variant. Format: (r, g, b, a).

colorTwo.label: Color two
colorTwo.description: Secondary color tint for dual-color graphic variants. Format: (r, g, b, a).

graphicData.label: Graphic data
graphicData.description: Full graphic configuration for this variant. Overrides texPath and color when set.

rottingTexPath.label: Rotting texture path
rottingTexPath.description: Texture path override for the rotting state.

dessicatedTexPath.label: Dessicated texture path
dessicatedTexPath.description: Texture path override for the dessicated corpse state.

swimmingTexPath.label: Swimming texture path
swimmingTexPath.description: Texture path override used when the pawn is swimming.

stationaryTexPath.label: Stationary texture path
stationaryTexPath.description: Texture path override used when the pawn is standing still.

dessicatedGraphicData.label: Dessicated graphic data
dessicatedGraphicData.description: Full graphic configuration override for the dessicated corpse state.

swimmingGraphicData.label: Swimming graphic data
swimmingGraphicData.description: Full graphic configuration override for the swimming state.

rottingGraphicData.label: Rotting graphic data
rottingGraphicData.description: Full graphic configuration override for the rotting state.

stationaryGraphicData.label: Stationary graphic data
stationaryGraphicData.description: Full graphic configuration override for the stationary state.

attachPoints.label: Attach points
attachPoints.description: Named attach points on this graphic variant used by equipment and apparel rendering.
